title: Basic JavaScript BOM (Browser Object Model)
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript BOM (Browser Object Model). Focus on implementing window object correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript BOM (Browser Object Model)
description: Create a function that uses window object and navigator object (userAgent, geolocation) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript BOM (Browser Object Model) Project
description: Build a small application that applies window object, navigator object (userAgent, geolocation), screen object in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript BOM (Browser Object Model)
description: The following code has bugs related to window object. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript BOM (Browser Object Model)
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with window object and navigator object (userAgent, geolocation).
